title: ATHLETA Womens Size XL Plus Whisper Featherless Puffer ThermoBall Jacket Teal
description: The ATHLETA Whisper Featherless Puffer ThermoBall Jacket in Teal is a stylish and functional outerwear piece designed for women in size XL. Made with polyester outer shell and taffeta fabric type, this jacket features a zip closure, logo accents, and a relaxed fit. With its lightweight design and synthetic insulation, it is perfect for outdoor activities in the fall season. Additionally, it includes inner pockets, a fishtail hem, and long sleeves for added comfort and versatility. Easy to care for with machine washable instructions, this jacket from Athleta combines practicality with a trendy style.
